title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Lack of Data Classification
description: Without a defined data classification scheme, the system may inadvertently expose sensitive information to unauthorized users or systems. This includes Personally Identifiable Information (PII), financial data, or intellectual property.
attack_vector: Misconfigured access controls, inadequate encryption, or unintentional data leakage through logging or monitoring.
mitigations: Implement a comprehensive data classification scheme based on sensitivity.
Apply appropriate data loss prevention (DLP) controls.
Regularly audit access controls and data security policies.
